dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses RSI mean reversion logic with 14-day lookback (rsi_14). Entry conditions trigger on crosses of 30 (buy) and 70 (sell) thresholds. Exit conditions reverse the logic: long exits on RSI crossing above 70 (imminent downturn), shorts exit on RSI crossing below 30 (imminent upturn). Direction is context-dependent based on which threshold is penetrated first. The 'average-off method' mentioned in source text is standard RSI calculation already built into rsi_14 indicator.

Exit conditions reverse the logic: long exits on RSI crossing above 70 (imminent downturn), shorts exit on RSI crossing below 30 (imminent upturn). Direction is context-dependent based on which threshold is penetrated first. The 'average-off method' mentioned in source text is standard RSI calculation already built into rsi_14 indicator.

source_rule_text: When RSI penetrates below 30, an imminent upturn is indicated; when RSI penetrates above 70, an imminent downturn is indicated.
